title: telosma pallida
intro: Telosma pallida, also known as the yellow flame vine, is a flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Telosma pallida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Telosma pallida typically involve drying and processing the plant's flowers and leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
